Daily Routine

How Every Day Works

A structured, safe routine from school bell to pickup — designed to give parents complete peace of mind.

01

School Pickup

Branded, commercially insured shuttle picks up your child directly from their Richmond Hill school at end of day.

02

Text Alert

The moment your child checks in safely at the club, you receive a text notification — real-time peace of mind.

03

Taekwondo Class

Full curriculum training — identical to evening classes — with qualified instructors working toward black belt.

04

Homework & Play

After class: supervised study room for homework, then free play until you arrive — whenever your workday ends.

Black BeltTrack Included
Why Enroll

More Than Childcare

This is a full martial arts membership. Your child trains, progresses through belt ranks, and develops real discipline every day.

  • Black Belt Pathway

    Same curriculum as evening classes. Students earn belt promotions all the way to black belt.

  • Evening & Weekend Classes Free

    All after school members attend regular evening and weekend classes at no extra charge.

  • Authorized by Taekwondo Ontario

    Officially authorized Recreational After School Program. Certified, trusted, and accountable.

  • Grades JK to 8 — 2 to 5 Days/Week

    From Junior Kindergarten through Grade 8. Enroll for the days that fit your family's schedule.

Our Programs

Three Separate Programs

The After School Program, Taekwondo Classes, and Camp are each completely separate offerings. Enroll in one, two, or all three — the choice is yours.

Separate Program

After School Program

Shuttle pickup from school, taekwondo training, homework room, and supervised free play — Monday to Friday, 2 to 5 days per week enrollment. Grades JK–8.

Enroll Now
Separate Program

Taekwondo Classes

Evening and weekend classes for Tots (4–6), Juniors (7–12), and Teens/Adults (13+). Structured belt curriculum with goal-oriented promotional testing.

Learn More
Separate Program

Camp Programs

Exciting camps for kids aged 5–12 during Summer, March Break, and PA Days. Taekwondo, games, crafts, and real field trip adventures.

See Camps
Camp Field Trips

Adventure Beyond the Dojo

Our camps take kids on unforgettable outings — from the Toronto Zoo to treetop adventures and farm visits.

Toronto Zoo — Summer Camp Field Trip
Tree Top Trekking — Summer Camp Field Trip
Brooks Farm — Jumping fun at the farm
Enrollment Details

Flexible Options

Who Can Join

  • Junior Kindergarten (JK) and up
  • Grade 1 through Grade 8
  • No prior martial arts experience needed
  • All fitness levels and abilities welcome
  • Richmond Hill area families

Enrollment Days

  • 2 days per week (minimum enrollment)
  • 3 days per week available
  • 4 days per week available
  • 5 days per week (full week) available
  • Monday through Friday pickup

Schools We Serve

  • Most Richmond Hill public schools
  • Catholic elementary schools in area
  • Private elementary schools nearby
  • Contact us to confirm your school
  • Fully branded & insured vehicles

Included Benefits

  • Evening & weekend classes free of charge
  • Text notification on safe arrival
  • Supervised homework room
  • Belt promotions & black belt track
  • Kukkiwon-certified black belt certificates
Transportation

Safe Shuttle
From School

We run our own branded fleet directly from most Richmond Hill schools. Every vehicle carries full commercial bus insurance for passenger pickup — your child's safety is never an afterthought.

Commercially insured — licensed for child passenger transport
Chung's branded vehicles — easy for your child to recognize

About the Academy

17 Years of Excellence

Chung's Taekwondo Academy is a proud member of Taekwondo Ontario and the World Taekwondo Federation. Our instructors hold 4th Degree Black Belt and above. All black belt members receive Kukkiwon-certified certificates recognized worldwide.

Master Chung — our Head Master and owner — was born into a Taekwondo legacy in Daegu, South Korea. A 7th Dan Black Belt with over 20 years of teaching experience and a World Taekwondo Federation Instructor's Certificate.

Meet Our Team
